rationale: The structural reorder closes both round-2 inputs: both keys are comma-ok/null checked and decoded before the sole pending-empty early return. Valid absent/empty inputs and valid exact coverage remain unchanged; the complete package, named PanelRefuted suites, and all 16 predicate subtests pass. However, the broader corrupt-shape class remains open inside panel_refuted_entries: encoding/json accepts a null array element as a zero-valued panel.Refutation, and covered-entry shape is never validated. The realizable metadata {"panel_refuted_entries":[null]} with pending absent returns nil; an absolute-/tmp overlay probe fails because CheckPendingObligations accepts it. Likewise a missing/empty slot or round in a refuted element is silently tolerated when pending is empty. This violates the unconditional present-but-corrupt REFUSES contract even though such an entry cannot cover a valid pending obligation. Pending elements are shape-checked, but only after the pending-empty return; refuted elements have no equivalent validation at all.
concrete_changes_required: Validate every decoded panel_refuted_entries element (non-empty slot and round >= 1) before the pending-empty early return, and add tests for a null element and missing/zero slot/round with absent or empty pending.

findings.section_1: ADDRESSED: both exact round-2 corrupt inputs now error; both top-level keys are validated before the only early return.
findings.section_2: NEW_ISSUE: {"panel_refuted_entries":[null]} is realizable and returns nil with pending absent. Null decodes to a zero-valued Refutation, and refuted elements receive no shape validation.
findings.section_3: ADDRESSED: valid absent arrays, valid empty arrays, and exact valid coverage remain accepted; package and named regression suites pass, including 16 predicate subtests.
